mechanism_narrative: An increase in the unemployment rate triggers a decrease in labor demand, leading to lower supply and subsequently positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in post-recovery periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the housing market triggers a decrease in demand for goods and services, leading to lower supply and subsequently positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls below 1000 units in 2 months
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 1-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in housing-market-downturn periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: An increase in the industrial production rate triggers an increase in supply, leading to higher demand and subsequently negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 1-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in late-cycle-expansion periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the real savings rate triggers a decrease in demand for goods and services, leading to lower supply and subsequently positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS falls below 700000 millions in 2 months
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 1-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in monetary-tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the federal funds rate triggers a decrease in discount rates applied to equity cash flows, leading to lower demand and subsequently positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 1-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: An increase in the labor force participation rate triggers an increase in labor demand, leading to higher supply and subsequently negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 1-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in post-recovery-expansion periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the GDP growth rate triggers a decrease in demand for goods and services, leading to lower supply and subsequently positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 falls below 23000 billions in 2 months
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 1-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in housing-market-downturn periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: An increase in the industrial production rate triggers an increase in supply, leading to higher demand and subsequently negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 1-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in late-cycle-expansion periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
